steps.title: Identify each term
steps.content:
The equation separates the total car price into the down payment plus the amount paid through monthly payments:
$$15{,}600=3{,}600+240t$$

steps.title: Interpret the coefficient
steps.content: Because $t$ is the number of monthly payments, multiplying $240$ by $t$ gives the total paid across all those monthly payments.

steps.title: Name the monthly amount
steps.content: So $240$ is the dollar amount of each fixed monthly payment. The answer is B.
